name: h8mail
description: Email OSINT & breach hunting Tool: https://pypi.org/project/h8mail/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #664 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map h8mail output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved h8mail output file to parse instead of running it live.
